description: Audit pct_change for pandas 3.x deprecation — GitHub trovlunde/stock_analyzer#5

userStories.title: Audit pct_change call sites in stock_analysis
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a complete inventory of pct_change usage before edits so no call site is missed and the one existing fill_method=None fix is confirmed.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep stock_analysis/ for pct_change and list every module and approximate call count in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
Confirm fundamental financial-statement revenue_growth already uses fill_method=None
Confirm no pct_change calls exist outside stock_analysis/ package that are in scope (note any in tests if found)

userStories.title: Add fill_method=None to technical analysis pct_change calls
userStories.description: As a developer running technical classifiers, I want explicit fill_method on return and volatility features so pandas deprecation warnings stay silent.
acceptanceCriteria: Every pct_change call in technical analysis modules (prepare_classification_data, movement_classification, nn_predictor, linear_reg_sig_days) passes fill_method=None explicitly
Existing periods, shift, and rolling chains unchanged aside from the new keyword

userStories.title: Add fill_method=None to remaining pct_change call sites
userStories.description: As a developer running portfolio and market analysis helpers, I want all remaining pct_change calls to opt out of deprecated forward-fill behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Every pct_change call in helpers, metrics, sp500_analysis, analyze_stock_data, and portfolio_evaluating passes fill_method=None explicitly
Fundamental fin_statement_classifier revenue_growth call remains fill_method=None (no regression)

userStories.title: Add regression test for pct_change FutureWarning
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a pytest that fails if pct_change deprecation warnings return so the fix cannot silently regress.
acceptanceCriteria: New test under tests/ exercises at least one technical prepare_classification_data path and one fundamental or metrics path using synthetic DataFrames (no yfinance)
Test uses warnings.catch_warnings or pytest.warns to assert no FutureWarning mentioning pct_change fill_method
Repo-wide grep of stock_analysis/ shows fill_method=None at every pct_change call site
